name: stoaix — S1 Call Then WhatsApp

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "sip_trunk_id":         "{{ $('Build Voice + WA Payload').item.json.trunk_id }}",
  "sip_call_to":          "{{ $('Build Voice + WA Payload').item.json.phone }}",
  "room_name":            "{{ $('Build Voice + WA Payload').item.json.room_name }}",
  "participant_identity": "sip-{{ $('Build Voice + WA Payload').item.json.phone.replace(/\\+/g,'') }}",
  "participant_name":     "{{ $('Build Voice + WA Payload').item.json.contact_name }}",
  "participant_metadata": "{{ $('Build Voice + WA Payload').item.json.agent_metadata.replace(/"/g, '\\"') }}"
}

notes: S1 Call Then WhatsApp. Tries voice call first. Waits voice_wait_minutes (60 default). If voice unanswered → sends WA template fallback. If no voice SIP → WA directly. Both channels can fail independently.
